<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天神社 (糸島市)]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天神社 (糸島市)]]
{{Expand Japanese|天神社 (糸島市)|date=November 2025}}
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天神社 (糸島市)]]

{{Notability|date=April 2015}}
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| Name = Tenjin Shrine
| image = {{image requested|cat=Itoshima, Fukuoka}}
| location = 3-1189-19 Kamiari Nishi, {{ill|Itoshima, Fukuoka|en|Itoshima, Fukuoka|WD=Q1011145|lt=Itoshima City|1=Itoshima}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, Japan 819-1148
| ISO = JP-40
| Latitude = 33 | Lat_min = 32 | Lat_sec = 36.9
| Longitude = 130 | Lon_min = 10 | Lon_sec = 10.3
| Label Position = right
| Map = Japan Fukuoka # Japan
| deity = [[Amaterasu]]
| type = [[Mukakusha]] (Unranked Shrine)
| location = {{ill|Itoshima|WD=Q1011145|1=Itoshima}}
| coordinates = {{Coord|33.54358|N|130.169539|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
}}

{{nihongo|Tenjinsha|天神社}} is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itoshima, Fukuoka|en|Itoshima, Fukuoka|WD=Q1011145|lt=Itoshima City|1=Itoshima}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, dedicated to [[Amaterasu]].

According to legend, when {{ill|Empress Jingū|en|Empress Jingū|WD=Q232803|lt=Empress Jingū|1=Empress Jingū}} was on her way to the [[Conquest of the Three Han]], she saw mist drifting between *Tenjinyama* (Tenjin Mountain) and *Takagamine* (Miyajidake) and interpreted it as an auspicious sign, exclaiming, "There is a divine presence here." Because of this, *Amaterasu Ōmikami* was enshrined on Tenjin Mountain.

Originally, the shrine was a private shrine (*tainai-sha*) of a former [[Ise Grand Shrine]] priest's residence. However, in the Heisei era, it was relocated to its current site.

{{Shinto-stub}}


{{translated page|ja|天神社 (糸島市)|version=92570236|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:天神社 (糸島市)]]
[[ja:天神社 (明石市)]]
[[ja:明石市]]
[[ja:徳島眉山天神社]]
[[ja:眉山町]]
[[ja:徳島市]]
[[ja:天神社 (徳島市)]]
[[ja:天神社 (徳島市入田町)]]
[[ja:糸島市]]
[[ja:天神社]]
{{wikidata link|Q22119506}}
[[Category:Buildings and structures in Itoshima, Fukuoka]]
[[Category:Image requests in Itoshima City]]
[[Category:Municipal History of Itoshima]]
[[Category:Shinto shrines in Fukuoka Prefecture]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
